title: Boys to Men
overview: A four-part anthology film dealing with homosexuality from the young to the old.  Crush, detailing the budding relationship between two 16-year old boys, who bond over their outdoor sports.  The Mountain King, details a young street hustler who makes a play for a straight man on a deserted beach one afternoon. .  Lost is a look at a day in the life of a young man who is first seen engaging in unsafe sex with a random partner,.  The Confession, a dying Catholic asks his partner of 35 years to send for a priest, even though the partner is greatly opposed to such a request. ~ Jason Clark, Rovi
